items.title: Follow live: Messi, Miami seeking second straight win, facing Real Salt Lake
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mets finally end skid, but see Lindor (calf) exit
items.dek: Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor was removed from Wednesday's game against the Twins with left calf tightness after scoring from first base in the fourth inning.
items.body: Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor was removed from Wednesday's game against the Twins with left calf tightness after scoring from first base in the fourth inning.

items.title: Flyers win G3 to push Pens to brink of elimination
items.dek: Trevor Zegras, Rasmus Ristolainen and Nick Seeler scored three goals on four shots in the second period, pushing the Flyers to the brink of a sweep with a 5-2 G
items.body: Trevor Zegras, Rasmus Ristolainen and Nick Seeler scored three goals on four shots in the second period, pushing the Flyers to the brink of a sweep with a 5-2 Game 3 win against the Penguins.
items.author: IriLine Desk
